mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ITLK_STM_NM FROM PM_ITLK_RSC_MST WHERE 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN != 'Y' ORDER BY 1

SELECT b.ITLK_ID, b.PARAM_KEY, b.PARAM_VAL, b.PARAM_EXPL FROM PM_ITLK_RSC_MST a, PM_ITLK_RSC_PARAM_MAP b WHERE 1=1 AND a.ITLK_ID = #{itlkId} AND a.ITLK_ID = b.ITLK_ID AND a.USE_YN = 'Y' AND a.DEL_YN != 'Y'
